original_text: Hi Wei, just wanted to let you know Lily did really well on her fractions quiz today. She scored 85%!
translated_text: 嗨Wei，想告诉你Lily今天分数测验考得很好，得了85分！

original_text: 谢谢老师！Lily回家也很开心。她说分数很有趣。
translated_text: Thank you teacher! Lily was very happy when she came home too. She said fractions are fun.

original_text: Hi Fatima, Amir has been doing wonderfully in science. His experiment report was one of the best in the class.
translated_text: مرحبا فاطمة، أمير كان رائعا في العلوم. تقريره عن التجربة كان من أفضل التقارير في الصف.

original_text: شكرا جزيلا! أمير يحب العلوم كثيرا. هل يمكنك اقتراح كتب علمية له؟
translated_text: Thank you very much! Amir loves science a lot. Can you suggest science books for him?

original_text: Hi Sarah, Tom has been a bit quiet this week. Everything okay at home? Just checking in.
translated_text: Hi Sarah, Tom has been a bit quiet this week. Everything okay at home? Just checking in.

original_text: Thanks for letting me know. He had a rough weekend with his grandpa being unwell. Should be better soon.
translated_text: Thanks for letting me know. He had a rough weekend with his grandpa being unwell. Should be better soon.

original_text: Hi fatima, how are you today?
